_meta.title: MSSQL → MySQL 윈도우 함수 변환
_meta.description: 분석/윈도우 함수 — MySQL 8.0+ 지원. 이전 버전은 변수로 구현

rules.tgt: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY col)

rules.src: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY col1 ORDER BY col2)
rules.tgt: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY col1 ORDER BY col2)
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY col)
rules.note: RANK OK — 동점 시 같은 순위, 다음 순위 건너뜀

rules.tgt: DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY col)
rules.note: DENSE_RANK OK — 동점 시 같은 순위, 건너뛰지 않음

rules.tgt: NTILE(n) OVER (ORDER BY col)

rules.src: LAG(col, n, default) OVER (ORDER BY col2)
rules.tgt: LAG(col, n, default) OVER (ORDER BY col2)

rules.src: LEAD(col, n, default) OVER (ORDER BY col2)
rules.tgt: LEAD(col, n, default) OVER (ORDER BY col2)
FIRST_VALUE(col) OVER (ORDER BY col2)

rules.src: LAST_VALUE(col) OVER (ORDER BY col2 ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING)
rules.tgt: LAST_VALUE(col) OVER (ORDER BY col2 ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING)

rules.src: SUM(col) OVER (PARTITION BY col2 ORDER BY col3)
rules.tgt: SUM(col) OVER (PARTITION BY col2 ORDER BY col3)
AVG(col) OVER (PARTITION BY col2)
COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY col)
MAX(col) OVER (PARTITION BY col2)
MIN(col) OVER (PARTITION BY col2)
PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY col)
CUME_DIST() OVER (ORDER BY col)

rules.src: ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
rules.tgt: ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW

rules.src: ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
rules.tgt: ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING

rules.src: RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
rules.tgt: RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
-- MySQL 5.7 이하: SET @rn=0; SELECT @rn:=@rn+1 AS rn, col FROM table ORDER BY col

rules.src: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY g ORDER BY col)
rules.tgt: -- MySQL 5.7: SET @rn=0, @grp=''; SELECT @rn:=IF(@grp=g,@rn+1,1) AS rn, @grp:=g AS grp, col FROM table ORDER BY g, col

rules.src: SUM(col) OVER (ORDER BY id) AS running_total
rules.tgt: -- MySQL 5.7: SET @rt=0; SELECT @rt:=@rt+col AS running_total FROM table ORDER BY id
